message.content:
@startuml
actor "User Agent" as UA
participant "Content Upload API\n(RESTful)" as CUA
database "Content\ndatabase" as DB
boundary CAFFParser as CP

note right of CUA : MUST also include a CSRF token to prevent users \nof other, potentially XSS vulnerable sites from taking part in massive distributed spam or DoS operation. 

CUA ->+CP: Validate upload request 
activate CP  
return result   
deactivate CP  

alt [Failed validation]    
    note left of CUA #lightyellow:* Content-Size header against max file size.\n* All fields within their respective supported bounds.\n  * Structure all match expectations per spec.\n   - Number bytes uploaded == number expected based on metadata provided by client-side script before sending actual data stream over network connection itself!     
else [[Request deemed valid]]        
     alt {Upload succeeded}         
         return HTTP status signaling success reason failure occurred during processing phase after receiving incoming payload containing binary blob representing single instance type known colloquially among developers working primarily using Java programming language ecosystem tools libraries frameworks etcetera ad infinitum...      
      else       
          store content into persistent storage mechanism such relational databases management systems like MySQL PostgreSQL Oracle SQL Server MongoDB Cassandra Redis Memcached Elasticsearch Solr Lucene Neo4j OrientDB ArangoDB Couchbase Riak VoltDB Hazelcast Ignite GridGain Terracotta Coherence GemFire Infinispan JBoss Cache Ehcache OSCache SwarmCache Tangosol Clustered Edition WebSphere
